name: boards.create
description: Create a new board within a project. Optionally creates default columns (Backlog, To Do, In Progress, In Review, Done).

project_id.description: Project ID to create the board in (required)

is_default.description: Whether this is the default board for the project

create_default_columns.description: Whether to create default columns based on the chosen template

template.description: Column template: 'minimal' (To Do, In Progress, Done), 'standard' (adds Backlog + In Review), 'full' (all statuses). Default is minimal for progressive disclosure.

user_id.description: ID of the user creating the board

org_id.description: Optional organization ID for multi-tenant context
